title: Value Iteration output — gridworld policy + value function
html:
Reinforcement-learning console output: Value Iteration on a 4x4 gridworld printing optimal policy arrows + value function for gamma=1.0 vs gamma=0.2 (showing how heavy discounting collapses the value landscape) — likely from Yahir's osu cs coursework.

cs coursework · osu · value iteration · reinforcement learning
